title: Accounting & Bookkeeping Services Chennai | Virtual Auditor
description: Expert accounting and bookkeeping services in Chennai. Tally, Zoho Books, QuickBooks. Monthly books closing, bank reconciliation. Call +91-99622 60333.
bodyText:
Looking for accounting and bookkeeping services in Chennai? Virtual Auditor provides comprehensive accounting and bookkeeping services in Chennai, led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA). From daily transaction recording through monthly financial statements, we keep your books accurate, compliant, and audit-ready.

What is Accounting & Bookkeeping Services Chennai | Virtual Auditor?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Daily/weekly transaction recording in Tally Prime, Zoho Books, or QuickBooks — based on your preference. Bank reconciliation — monthly matching of all bank accounts with books of accounts. GST-compliant invoicing and purchase recording with correct HSN/SAC classification. Accounts receivable and payable management with ageing reports. Monthly financial statements — P&L, Balance Sheet, Trial Balance delivered by 10th of each month. Payroll processing — salary computation, TDS on salary, PF/ESI contributions. Annual financial statement preparation — audit-ready books with schedules and notes.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for Bookkeeping in Chennai
  Accurate bookkeeping is the foundation of tax compliance, financial planning, and business decision-making. Errors in books lead to incorrect GST returns (inviting demands), wrong income tax computation (inviting scrutiny), and unreliable financial information for management decisions. Virtual Auditor's CA-supervised bookkeeping ensures your books are not just recorded but reviewed for accuracy and compliance at every step. Our Spencer Plaza office in Chennai provides in-person support for document handover and review meetings. We serve manufacturing companies, service businesses, traders, professionals, and startups with industry-specific chart of accounts and reporting.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Onboarding — set up chart of accounts, configure accounting software, establish document flow. Step 2: Daily/weekly transaction recording from source documents. Step 3: Monthly bank reconciliation and vendor/customer ledger matching. Step 4: GST return data preparation with ITC reconciliation. Step 5: Monthly financial statements and MIS delivery. Step 6: Quarterly review with management — P&L analysis, cash flow discussion. Step 7: Year-end finalisation and audit-ready financial statements.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need bookkeeping services in Chennai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-99622 60333
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: G-131, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002
  Affordable monthly packages from Rs 5,000/month.

faqs.q: What accounting software do you use?
faqs.a: We work with Tally Prime, Zoho Books, QuickBooks Online, and Xero. If you have an existing system, we adapt to it. For new setups, we recommend the best fit based on your business size, GST requirements, and reporting needs.

faqs.q: How much does bookkeeping cost in Chennai?
faqs.a: Monthly bookkeeping starts from Rs 5,000/month for small businesses (up to 100 transactions). Pricing scales with transaction volume, number of bank accounts, and reporting complexity. Contact +91-99622 60333 for a customised quote.

faqs.q: Can you handle bookkeeping for my e-commerce business?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle e-commerce bookkeeping including marketplace reconciliation (Amazon, Flipkart), TCS credit tracking, multi-state GST implications, and return/refund accounting. E-commerce requires specialised treatment that general bookkeepers often miss.
